title: myrsine smithii
intro: Myrsine smithii, also known as New Zealand whittomea or New Zealand matipo, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Myrsine smithii can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and interactions with medications.
